gate: spec 13.E RLVR headroom (Goldilocks 30-70% on the exact selection held-out)

init_heldout_for_delta.note: canonical 4B init on the final corpus; receipts in git history of advisor-preflight-4b-wide-v0.1.*

provenance.train: LoRA r16 attention-only, 270 iters, global_batch 8, eval_iters 7, val 63 rows; lm val loss 0.5073 (PPL 1.66)

rationale: Post-SFT held-out sits at 100% scored and 100% strict — far above the 30-70% band where RL earns signal (>=85% means no headroom).
The prior SFT-vs-RLVR rule already selected SFT-only: correct trajectories were cheaply generatable by construction and outputs are enumerable label-free checks.

Router rev-2 re-run on the SFT lane: t1-only 28/28, routed t1+t3 and t1+t4 28/28; sole escalation is the known 0082 rank-sanity over-caution (route_acc 0.9643); the init's 0074 alias-residue false escalation vanished.
